subject: A large armored golem rises in a graveyard at night, its horned helm silhouetted against a stormy blue-lit sky
description: A massive armored golem floats or rises above a dark graveyard. The golem's body is composed of heavy angular stone or metal segments, with a prominent horned or crested helm and a gaping lower section resembling an open maw. The entire scene is bathed in deep blue and indigo tones with wisps of pale mist or smoke drifting around the golem's form. Grave markers of varying sizes are scattered across the foreground and middle ground. Bare, leafless trees frame the edges of the image. A dramatic sky behind the golem suggests storm light or supernatural illumination. The composition places the golem center-frame, looming over the cemetery below.
foreground: Scattered gravestones and grave markers on dark ground
background: Stormy night sky, bare trees, mist or smoke
emotion: Ominous and impassive; the golem has no readable facial expression but its scale and posture convey grim purpose
